title: ctenolophon englerianus
intro: Ctenolophon englerianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Ctenolophon englerianus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used to make ointments and other topical treatments.
